_doc: Prop firm rules reference — comprehensive source of truth for the trading dashboard. Each plan tracks ALL phases with full rule sets. Cross-machine via GitHub. Per-firm citations + research-pass FLAGs preserved in 'sources' / 'flags'. Updated when firms change rules.

blusky.name: BluSky Trading
blusky._consistencyFailModeNote: Excess no longer fails the account; system raises profit target so best-day = limit% of new target.
blusky._trailingNote: Calculated from highest EOD balance starting 6PM ET. Increases with profits, never decreases with losses. Static plans = floor never moves.
blusky._positionCutoffNote: Auto-liquidation attempt ~15min before market close. Not guaranteed.

eval1.label: Phase 1 — Evaluation
eval1._dailyLossLimitNote: Soft DLL — pauses the day, doesn't fail.
eval1._consistencyNote: PTV / 3rd-party = 30%. Help center current text reads 34%. Lauren's dashboard shows 30%.
eval1.passCriteria: Hit $3,000 target with consistency ≤ 30% AND stay above EOD MLL

blulive.label: Phase 2 — BluLive (Buffer)
blulive._profitTargetNote: Buffer goal — when reached, trailing drawdown converts to static.
blulive.passCriteria: Reach buffer target → trailing drawdown locks → advance to Sim Funded

simfunded.label: Sim Funded
simfunded._payoutNote: Payouts daily M–F. Before 11AM ET = same-day, after = next.

brokreview.label: Brokerage Review
brokreview._note: Account is in review pending live conversion. Trading = account voided. Open support ticket only.

live.label: Live Brokerage
live._note: Real-money account. Same drawdown discipline as Sim Funded.

PROPEL_200K.label: PROPEL 200K (Static Growth+)
PROPEL_200K._monthlyFeeNote: Estimated — verify against current pricing page.

eval1.label: Phase 1 — Evaluation
eval1._burnStartNote: Static MLL = startBal − trailDD = $198,000. Never moves.

blulive.label: Phase 2 — BluLive (Buffer)
blulive._setupFeeNote: Launch plan only — $99 paid on entering BluLive.

blusky._feeNote: BluSky charges $2.20 flat per round-trip trade (Tradovate fee model). Verified across 50K LAUNCH and 50K LAUNCH II CSVs.

maxAccounts.note: Up to 5 evals/BluLive + 3 SFAs simultaneously. Live accounts not counted.

apex.name: Apex Trader Funding
apex._metalsHaltedNote: All metals (GC, SI, QI, QO, MGC, HG, PL, PA) suspended indefinitely.

LEGACY_PA_50K.label: Legacy PA $50K (purchased < 2026-03-01)
LEGACY_PA_50K._legacyNote: Cannot purchase new — only accounts dated before 2026-03-01. NO migration path to 4.0.

eval1.label: Evaluation
eval1._drawdownNote: Intraday — MLL rises real-time on unrealized P&L during a trade. Tradovate quirk: trailing does NOT stop in eval; Rithmic stops when threshold hits target.
eval1._dailyLossLimitNote: No DLL on Legacy. DLL is 4.0 only.
eval1._consistencyEvalNote: No consistency in eval phase. Consistency only checked at payout time on PA.
eval1._minDaysNote: Pass on day 1 if math works.
eval1._maxContractsNote: 10 minis (or micro equivalent within same exposure).
eval1._botsNote: FLAG: Eval rules don't explicitly list bots, but Compliance sweeps 'all account types' — treat as banned to be safe.
eval1.passCriteria: Hit $3,000 with no breach of trailing drawdown.

pa.label: Performance Account (PA)
pa._burnStartNote: Trails until peak hits Safety Net $52,600, then locks at $50,100.
pa._lockedMLLNote: Locks at $50,100 (= startBal + $100) once Safety Net is reached.
pa._consistencyExempt: Drops at 6th approved payout OR move to Live Prop.
pa._consistencyFormula: Highest Profit Day ÷ 0.30 = Min Total Profit Required.
pa._MAENote: 30% of start-of-day profit balance. Loosens to 50% once EOD profit >= 2× Safety Net ($5,200 profit on $50K).
pa._fiveToOneNote: Stop loss must be ≤ 5× profit target. Removed in 4.0 but ACTIVE on Legacy.
pa._oneDirectionNote: Long OR short, never both, no bracket pairs.
pa._noHedgingNote: No offsetting on same/correlated instruments — even across micros vs minis.
pa._perPayoutCapNote: First 5 payouts capped at $2,000. From 6th onward: NO cap.
pa._safetyNetForPayoutsNote: First 3 payouts: balance must exceed Safety Net by (requested - $500). After 4th payout: drops.
pa._profitSplitNote: 100% of first $25,000 per account, then 90/10. 100% direct payouts begin at the 6th approved payout.
pa._halfSizeNote: Half-size = 5 contracts on $50K until balance > Safety Net. After: full 10 unlocks next session and stays.
pa._halfSizeViolation: Penalty: profits removed + 8 additional compliant trading days before next payout.
pa._botsAllowedNote: STRICTLY PROHIBITED on PA. AI, bots, HFT, fully automated systems all banned.
pa._thirdPartyCopyNote: PA must be traded by listed individual only.
pa._metalsHaltedNote: All metals (GC/SI/MGC/HG/PL/PA/QI/QO) halted since 2026-03-14, no return date. Applies to Legacy too.
pa._tradovateFeeNote: Verified 2026-05-09: PA-APEX-158140-09 actual NL $49,228.09 vs computed with $3.45/trade $49,228.17 — gap $0.08 rounding.

resetPolicy._note: PA accounts cannot be reset. Once breached, gone. Eval can be reset; non-refundable.

LEGACY_PA_50K.tradingDayDef: 6:00 PM ET → 4:59 PM ET next calendar day. Sunday counts as Monday's day.

PA_4_0_EOD_50K.label: Apex 4.0 EOD PA $50K (post-2026-03-01)
PA_4_0_EOD_50K._familyNote: Default rule set since Apex 4.0 launch (Mar 1, 2026).

eval1.label: Evaluation
eval1._dailyLossLimitNote: EOD only — pauses day, doesn't fail.

pa.label: Performance Account (PA)
pa._activationFeeNote: $99 within 7 calendar days of passing eval. Not discounted.

apex._feeNote: Apex Legacy charges \$3.45 per round-trip trade on Tradovate. Verified 2026-05-09 against account PA-APEX-158140-09 actual Net Liquidity \$49,228.09 (computed \$49,228.17, gap \$0.08 rounding). Different from BluSky \$2.20 and Lucid \$1.00/contract.

maxAccounts.note: Hard cap 20 active PA accounts shared across household/family/LLCs. No explicit eval cap. Exceeding = forfeiture.

lucid.name: Lucid Trading
lucid._positionCutoffNote: OFFICIAL Lucid time. Lauren's earlier 15:00 spec didn't match — she likely meant 16:45 = '15:00 PT' or had outdated info.

eval.label: Evaluation
eval._burnStartNote: Initial Trail Balance $52,100 — locks once exceeded.
eval._consistencyNote: Largest day / Total profit ≤ 50%. Built-in cushion ~$1,560 best day on $3,000 target.
eval._maxContractsNote: Full size from trade #1 — no half-size scaling.
eval._botsNote: Discretionary OR systematic (non-HFT). HFT, ultra-short scalping (<2 min, <10 ticks), reverse-trading PROHIBITED.

funded.label: LucidFlex Funded
funded._trailingNote: Locks at Initial Trail Balance $52,100. After 1st payout, MLL drops to Locked $50,100. Subsequent payouts don't reduce MLL.
funded._consistencyFundedNote: NO consistency on funded. 100% of profit can be from one day.
funded._perPayoutCapNote: 50% of balance up to $2,000 cap on 50K.
funded._scalingNote: End-of-session updates. One accidental oversize won't violate.

lucidlive.label: LucidLive (real money)
lucidlive._note: Auto-transition after 5 Flex payouts. Real-money account.

lucid._feeNote: Lucid charges per-contract not per-trade. Confirmed 2026-05-09 via Performance (35).csv: 39 trades / 66 contracts produced $66 fees, matching Lucid's broker-side balance exactly. (BluSky and Apex use a flat $2.20/round-trip-trade model.)

maxAccounts.note: Max 10 active accounts total (eval + funded combined). Funded sub-cap = 5 per household.

_flags: BluSky Premium Eval consistency: help-center text shows 34%, 3rd-party reviews say 30%. Lauren's dashboard uses 30% — kept that as authoritative until support ticket clarifies.
BluSky bot policy: not directly stated in help center ToS; funded.now indicates allowed. Low-confidence.
BluSky trailing-to-static conversion at profit target on Premium: claimed by PTV review but not in help-center articles directly. Confirmed for BluLive but verify for Premium eval.

LucidFlex initial-trail / locked-MLL numbers ($52,100 / $50,100) come from official Lucid help. Lauren's earlier $49,046 / $954 / 15:00 ET specs match a different product (LucidPro or LucidBlack legacy) — needs her dashboard screenshot for confirmation.
Apex 4.0 payout ladder ($1,500 / $1,500 / $2,000 / $2,500 / $2,500 / $3,000) sourced from PTV; verify against Apex help-center EOD Payouts article for canonical numbers.
